meaning: n.估计,预算,评价,判断,尊重
examples: Who is the best candidate in your estimation ?
He has gone down considerably in my estimation.
Lyell's strategy for estimation of geologic dates was not very accurate.
"He has had a wonderful season this year and shot up in everyone's estimation, " said Hodgson.
It was the first time the pentagon gave a public estimation of that number.
